name: Quick Lemon-Beef Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Beef flank steak, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a wok or skillet.
2. Add 1 tablespoon vegetable oil.
3. Add thinly sliced beef and sauté until half cooked.
4. Combine soy sauce, hoisin sauce, garlic, sugar, chili flakes, cornstarch, lemon zest, and lemon juice in a bowl to make the sauce.
5. Add the sauce mixture to the beef and stir well.
6. Cook for about 1 minute until glazed.
7. Add salt and white pepper to taste.
8. Stir in water chestnuts, carrots, and mushrooms.
9. Continue to cook until the vegetables are cooked but still crunchy.
10. Serve immediately with plain rice.
